title: When Classic Cache Policies Fail: Learning-Augmented Replacement for Semantic Retrieval Buffers
innovation_summary: When Classic Cache Policies Fail: Learning-Augmented Replacement for Semantic Retrieval Buffers: We propose SOLAR, a learning-augmented framework that derives modification timing from regret accumulation (achieving sim17\% modification rate) and content selection from Bayesian online learning over implicit.
why_it_matters: Overall signal 94/100 driven by novelty 100 and practical impact 100.
